test-case.description: passes Test-ModuleManifest
test-case.name: Windows-Development-Shell-Tools manifest.passes Test-ModuleManifest

test-case.description: exports every function listed in FunctionsToExport
test-case.name: Exported commands.exports every function listed in FunctionsToExport

test-case.description: returns four time formats
test-case.name: Get-DateTime.returns four time formats

test-case.description: returns the EICAR test string
test-case.name: Get-EicarSignature.returns the EICAR test string

test-case.description: returns x64 or x86
test-case.name: Get-OperatingSystemBitness.returns x64 or x86

test-case.description: returns a DataTable with Path, WDK, and Bitness columns
test-case.name: Find-WindowsKitFile.returns a DataTable with Path, WDK, and Bitness columns

test-case.description: maps directory layout into at least one row
test-case.name: Find-WindowsKitFile.maps directory layout into at least one row

test-case.description: Get-DebuggerPath searches for windbg.exe
test-case.name: Get-DebuggerPath, Get-KernelDebuggerPath, Get-SymbolCheck.Get-DebuggerPath searches for windbg.exe

test-case.description: Get-KernelDebuggerPath searches for kd.exe
test-case.name: Get-DebuggerPath, Get-KernelDebuggerPath, Get-SymbolCheck.Get-KernelDebuggerPath searches for kd.exe

test-case.description: Get-SymbolCheck searches for symchk.exe
test-case.name: Get-DebuggerPath, Get-KernelDebuggerPath, Get-SymbolCheck.Get-SymbolCheck searches for symchk.exe

test-case.description: counts lines for a single file path
test-case.name: Get-LinesOfCode.counts lines for a single file path

test-case.description: lists per file when -FileBased and -Recursive are set
test-case.name: Get-LinesOfCode.lists per file when -FileBased and -Recursive are set

test-suite.name: Get-DumpAnalysis and Open-DumpAnalysis.invokes the kernel debugger shim when a matching debugger row exists
test-suite.description: Get-DumpAnalysis and Open-DumpAnalysis.invokes the kernel debugger shim when a matching debugger row exists

test-case.description: Get-DumpAnalysis requests AnalyzeThenQuit
test-case.name: Get-DumpAnalysis and Open-DumpAnalysis.invokes the kernel debugger shim when a matching debugger row exists.Get-DumpAnalysis requests AnalyzeThenQuit

test-case.description: Open-DumpAnalysis requests AnalyzeStayOpen
test-case.name: Get-DumpAnalysis and Open-DumpAnalysis.invokes the kernel debugger shim when a matching debugger row exists.Open-DumpAnalysis requests AnalyzeStayOpen

test-case.description: Get-DumpAnalysis throws when the dump file is missing
test-case.name: Get-DumpAnalysis and Open-DumpAnalysis.Get-DumpAnalysis throws when the dump file is missing

test-case.description: Open-DumpAnalysis throws when the dump file is missing
test-case.name: Get-DumpAnalysis and Open-DumpAnalysis.Open-DumpAnalysis throws when the dump file is missing

test-suite.name: Find-Symbols.invokes symchk with the expected switches
test-suite.description: Find-Symbols.invokes symchk with the expected switches

test-case.description: runs symchk with /r only by default
test-case.name: Find-Symbols.invokes symchk with the expected switches.runs symchk with /r only by default

test-case.description: adds /v when -Detailed is set
test-case.name: Find-Symbols.invokes symchk with the expected switches.adds /v when -Detailed is set

test-case.description: adds /oc when -DownloadTo is set
test-case.name: Find-Symbols.invokes symchk with the expected switches.adds /oc when -DownloadTo is set

test-case.description: combines /v and /oc when both switches are used
test-case.name: Find-Symbols.invokes symchk with the expected switches.combines /v and /oc when both switches are used

test-case.description: throws when the path does not exist
test-case.name: Find-Symbols.throws when the path does not exist

test-case.description: does not throw when no debugger is found (no-op)
test-case.name: Connect-KernelDebugger.does not throw when no debugger is found (no-op)

test-case.description: starts WinDbg with the kernel pipe when a debugger row exists
test-case.name: Connect-KernelDebugger.starts WinDbg with the kernel pipe when a debugger row exists

test-case.description: returns a hex string starting with an offset line
test-case.name: Get-HexDump.returns a hex string starting with an offset line

test-case.description: returns version metadata for a copied System32 executable
test-case.name: Get-FileDetails.returns version metadata for a copied System32 executable

test-case.description: fills the certificate table from PKCS signer metadata
test-case.name: Get-AuthenticodeDetails.fills the certificate table from PKCS signer metadata

test-case.description: adds no rows when the signer has no nested PKCS attributes
test-case.name: Get-NestedAuthenticodeDetails.adds no rows when the signer has no nested PKCS attributes

test-case.description: expands nested Microsoft OID 1.3.6.1.4.1.311.2.4.1 using checked-in CMS fixture
test-case.name: Get-NestedAuthenticodeDetails.expands nested Microsoft OID 1.3.6.1.4.1.311.2.4.1 using checked-in CMS fixture

test-case.description: Get-AuthenticodeSignerInfosForFile returns PKCS signers for a common system PE
test-case.name: Get-AuthenticodeDetails integration.Get-AuthenticodeSignerInfosForFile returns PKCS signers for a common system PE

test-case.description: Get-AuthenticodeDetails returns certificate rows for a system file with embedded PKCS
test-case.name: Get-AuthenticodeDetails integration.Get-AuthenticodeDetails returns certificate rows for a system file with embedded PKCS

test-case.description: returns a DataTable with expected columns and parses Fusion-style value names
test-case.name: Get-GlobalAssemblyCache.returns a DataTable with expected columns and parses Fusion-style value names
